race.comment: CHANDON STAR (4) is a consistent gelding racing in career-best form. Showed his usual early dash from the wide gate when he fought on bravely to run second over this trip at Dubbo in a fast run contest. Will take control early from the better gate with a winning rider jumping back aboard. SARATOGA POWER (2) excellent return from the wide gate when he shouldered the 61.5kg to finish a gritty fourth over 900m at Muswellbrook. Claim helps from the good gate and will be charging late. DIS IS HEAVEN (8) deep into the prep and worth another chance after his good efforts earlier in his campaign. Drawn to stalk the fast early speed and no shock to see him improve quickly. BOMAREA (3) talented mare who comes back a level after finishing a sound third in the MNC Champs over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Shapes as a leading prospect.
